objective: Establish a complete monitoring, alerting, and intelligence pipeline using FastAPI, Prometheus, Alertmanager, and Docker with verified end-to-end flow from metrics generation to webhook-triggered actions
decisions: Use FastAPI as metrics provider and webhook receiver
Use Prometheus for metrics collection and alert evaluation
Implement webhook receiver in FastAPI for alert consumption
Use Docker Compose to orchestrate Prometheus, Alertmanager, and Grafana
Replace localhost with host.docker.internal for Docker-to-host communication
Remove invalid docker-compose YAML structure and rebuild correctly
Use curl loops to generate workload for triggering alerts
Create AlwaysFiring alert rule for pipeline validation
Map alerts to webhook_receiver instead of null_receiver
Use extra_hosts mapping for host resolution inside containers
Perform full Docker reset (down -v, prune, up) for consistent state
Validate system via Prometheus UI (/targets, /alerts) and Alertmanager UI
Introduce intelligence trigger inside webhook handler

built_components.name: FastAPI Backend
built_components.details: Provides /metrics endpoint for Prometheus and /job endpoint for workload simulation and webhook endpoint for alert handling

built_components.name: Prometheus
built_components.details: Scrapes metrics from FastAPI and evaluates alert rules

built_components.name: Alertmanager
built_components.details: Receives alerts from Prometheus and forwards to webhook

built_components.name: Grafana
built_components.details: Runs as part of stack but not deeply configured in this chat

built_components.name: Docker Compose Stack
built_components.details: Defines services: prometheus, alertmanager, grafana with networking

built_components.name: Webhook Intelligence Handler
built_components.details: Receives alert payload and logs 'ALERT RECEIVED', triggers placeholder intelligence action

inputs: HTTP POST /job requests to simulate workload
outputs: Alert states visible in Prometheus UI
Webhook POST requests sent to FastAPI
dependencies: Prometheus container accessing host via host.docker.internal
Alertmanager accessible at alertmanager:9093 inside Docker network
notes: End-to-end observability and alert pipeline is operational and verified. Intelligence layer exists only as logging/trigger placeholder. Decision engine, action execution, and system control mechanisms are not yet implemented.
